prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约28854→41164→24444→25049→39518名，波动剧烈，2022年因试卷难度变化位次大幅后移，2023–2024年明显回升，20 25年再次大幅后移至约39518名，近5年无稳定趋势，2025年基准约39518名；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年365人、2022年369人、2023年352人、 2024年359人、2025年363人，2026年计划425人，较2025年扩招约17%，扩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科2026年主榜约第67名，近年排名稳定在54–67名区间，属中上游211层次；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，涉及学校管理回应，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第68位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未见报考关注度异常升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校明显断档事件；安全科学与工程 A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，与该校矿业安全特色高度匹配，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电 子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热推荐，与中国矿业大学工科专业设置契合；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（数据标注不确定），较2025年物理类55.5万大幅增加，按近年 比例估算物理类约73.4万人，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧，位次数字趋于减小；中国矿业大学位于江苏徐州，非本省高校；2025年在河南省招生占比约6.6%， 属中等偏上水平，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约39518名、2026年大幅扩招约17%使位次数字增大、河南省物理类考生规模显著扩大使竞争加剧位 次数字减小，两者方向相反但考生增加效应略强；同时学校声誉平稳、抖音热度一般、工科专业热度持续，无额外冲击信号。经权衡，预测2026年最低位次约43518名，区间43018–44018名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 28854 → 41164 → 24444 → 25049 → 39518, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, rankings dropped sharply due to changes in exam difficulty, rebounded in 2023–2024, and dropped again to about 39518 in 2025, showing no stable trend over the past five years. The 2025 baseline is about 39518. The university's enrollment plan in Henan for science (physics category) was 365 in 2021, 369 in 2022, 352 in 2023, 359 in 2024, 363 in 2025, and 425 in 2026, an increase of about 17% compared to 2025, which theoretically alleviates competition pressure and tends to increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 67th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, stable in the 54–67 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, involving school management responses, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 68th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal surge in application attention; no obvious discontinuities in historical admission records; Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, highly aligned with the university's mining safety characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, matching the engineering majors offered by China University of Mining and Technology; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Henan in 2026 is about 1.2 million (data marked as uncertain), significantly increasing from 555,000 in the physics category in 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, the physics category has about 734,000 candidates, with a significant expansion in candidate numbers, intensifying competition and tending to decrease ranking numbers; China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university; in 2025, its enrollment proportion in Henan was about 6.6%, at an upper-middle level, with no obvious regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 39518, a significant enrollment expansion of about 17% in 2026 tends to increase ranking numbers, while a significant expansion in the number of physics category candidates in Henan intensifies competition and tends to decrease ranking numbers. These two effects are opposite, but the candidate increase effect is slightly stronger. At the same time, the university's reputation is stable, Douyin heat is average, and engineering major popularity continues, with no additional impact signals. After weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 43518, with a range of 43018–44018.

- Artificial Intelligence.

- Business Administration/Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 43018–44018, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 43000), focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 44000), use Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors (Safety Engineering A+, Surveying A-) as safety options while striving for Tier 2 majors like Mechanical and Automation.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 4474 → 4515 → 4492 → 4004 → 4542, fluctuating narrowly within the 4000–4550 range, with a maximum fluctuation of only about 538 over the past 5 years. In 2024, there was a slight forward shift to 4004, rebounding to 4542 in 2025, showing a stable trend, with a 2025 baseline of about 4542. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 24 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 36 in 2025, and 48 in 2026, an increase of about 33% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically eases competitive pressure and tends to increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th in the 2026 main list of Soft Science, with stable rankings in the 54–67 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving university management responses, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking 68th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal surge in application attention signals. No obvious discontinuities in historical admission anomalies. Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, all engineering disciplines, with no direct subject mapping to liberal arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.), but supporting the overall university level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social heat but clear differentiation, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese recommended, Business Administration differentiated and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages generally wait-and-see. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (data marked as uncertain), a significant increase from 352,000 in the history category in 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, the history category is about 466,000, with a notable expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition and tending to decrease ranking numbers. China University of Mining and Technology is located in Xuzhou, Jiangsu, not a local university. In 2025, its enrollment proportion in Henan Province was about 6.6%, at an upper-middle level, with no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of about 4542, a significant 33% enrollment expansion in 2026 tending to increase ranking numbers, and a notable expansion in the scale of history category candidates in Henan Province intensifying competition and tending to decrease ranking numbers, the two directions are opposite, with the expansion effect slightly stronger than the candidate increase effect. Meanwhile, the historical fluctuation of liberal arts rankings is extremely small, university reputation is stable, and Douyin heat is average.
